title: BLUELIGHT RAT: YARA Chrome/Edge Cookie Theft (APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight_B)
description: Detects BLUELIGHT browser cookie theft targeting Google authentication. The malware extracts SID, OSID, __Secure-3PSID cookies from Chrome/Edge to hijack Gmail and Google Account sessions. Enables IMAP access on victim Gmail accounts for persistent email exfiltration. Based on Volexity YARA rule APT_MAL_Win_BlueLight_B $chrome strings.
query: ('Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Events' or 'Log Source' = 'Windows Sysmon Operational Logs' or 'Log Source' = 'SOC Windows Sysmon Logs') and ((('Command Line' like '*cookie_name: OSID*' or 'Command Line' like '*cookie_name: SID,*' or 'Command Line' like '*__Secure-3PSID*' or 'Command Line' like '*cookie_name: __Secure-3PSID*')) or (('Command Line' like '*GM_ACTION_TOKEN*' or 'Command Line' like '*GM_ID_KEY=*' or 'Command Line' like '*mail/u/0/?ik=*' or 'Command Line' like '*Success to enable imap*' or 'Command Line' like '*Success to enable thunder access*')) or (('Command Line' like '*Failed to get chrome cookie*' or 'Command Line' like '*Failed to get Edge cookie*' or 'Command Line' like '*Failed to get New Edge cookie*'))) | stats count by 'Host Name (Server)', Entity, 'Process Name'
falsepositives: None expected - these strings are unique to BLUELIGHT malware
